reason: The Logitech MX Keys wireless keyboard is compatible with the Dell Latitude 5420 laptop via Bluetooth or USB receiver connectivity.
The Logitech MX Master 3 is a wireless mouse compatible with most laptops including Dell Latitude via Bluetooth or USB receiver.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks typically feature HDMI output ports, making this 2-meter HDMI cable compatible for video display connections.
The Dell Latitude 5420 includes USB-C connectivity and can be charged/connected via USB-C cables like the Anker 100W USB-C cable.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks include DisplayPort-compatible video outputs, allowing this 6ft DisplayPort cable to connect for external display support.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks feature USB-C ports that can connect to HDMI displays via a Type-C HDMI dongle adapter.
Dell Latitude 5420 notebooks support USB-C charging and are compatible with Dell Type-C chargers of appropriate wattage.
Logitech MX Keys is a wireless Bluetooth keyboard that is compatible with the ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptop via Bluetooth or USB receiver.
Logitech MX Master 3 is a wireless/wired mouse compatible with any standard laptop including ThinkPad T14 Gen2 via USB or Bluetooth connectivity.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptops typically include HDMI ports and are compatible with standard HDMI cables for video output to displays.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 features USB-C connectivity and supports high-power charging, making it compatible with this 100W USB-C cable for data transfer and charging.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptops typically include DisplayPort connectivity, making this 6ft DisplayPort cable compatible for video output.
ThinkPad T14 Gen2 laptops have USB-C ports that can connect to USB-C to HDMI dongles for display output.
Logitech MX Keys is a universal wireless keyboard compatible with Apple MacBook Air M2 via Bluetooth or USB receiver.
The Logitech MX Master 3 is a wireless/Bluetooth mouse that is compatible with Apple MacBooks including the M2 13-inch model.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13 has Thunderbolt 4 ports that support video output via HDMI through adapters or docking stations, making HDMI cables compatible peripherals for display connectivity.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13" includes USB-C ports and can use standard USB-C cables like the Anker 100W cable for charging and data transfer.
Apple MacBook Air M2 13" includes Thunderbolt 4 ports which are backward compatible with DisplayPort cables for video connectivity.
Apple MBA 13 M2 has USB-C ports that can accept Type-C HDMI dongles for video output connectivity.
LG 27UL500-W is a 4K monitor with HDMI input ports that can accept standard HDMI cables like the CBL-HDMI-2M for video signal transmission.
The LG 27UL500-W monitor supports USB-C connectivity for video, data, and power delivery, making the Anker USB-C cable compatible for connection and power delivery.
LG 27UL500-W 4K monitors typically feature DisplayPort inputs that accept standard DisplayPort cables for video connectivity.
Samsung LC32F391 is a modern curved monitor with HDMI connectivity, and a standard 2-meter HDMI cable is the appropriate cable for video signal transmission.
Samsung LC32F391 monitors typically include DisplayPort connectivity, making a standard 6ft DisplayPort cable compatible for video signal transmission.
The Samsung LC32F391 monitor has HDMI inputs and the Type C HDMI dongle converts USB-C to HDMI, enabling connection via adapter if the source device has USB-C output.
Both are Logitech wireless peripherals from the professional MX series that use the same 2.4GHz Unifying receiver or Bluetooth connectivity for seamless pairing with the same host device.
A standard HDMI cable can connect to a Type C HDMI dongle's HDMI output port to transmit video/audio to a display or device.
The USB-C cable can connect to and power the Type C HDMI dongle, enabling video output from a USB-C device.
A USB-C cable can connect to and power a USB drive if the drive has a USB-C connector, though typical USB drives use USB-A ports.
